title: diastema tenerrimum
intro: Diastema tenerrimum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the weak diastema. It is a climber with small white flowers and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Diastema tenerrimum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and improving skin health.
